name: Emotional Support
description: Mood-aware reminders that meet you where you are
messages: Hey, you're doing better than you think. Sip some water 💙
One sip at a time. That's all it takes 🌊
You showed up today. That matters. Now hydrate 💧
Taking care of your body is taking care of you 💚
Sending you calm energy and a water reminder 🌿
Small steps. Small sips. Big love 💙
You made it this far. Have some water, you've earned it 🌟
Here's a little hydration hug 💧🤗
You matter. Your hydration matters too 💙
Whatever you're feeling right now, water helps 🌊
A sip of water, a moment of peace 💧
You're allowed to pause. Drink some water 💙
Hydrating is a quiet way to be kind to yourself 🌿
Breathe. Sip. Repeat. You're doing great 🌊
This is your gentle nudge. Water is self-care 💧
You deserve care. Starting with this glass 💙
No pressure. Just a friendly sip reminder 🌟
Water can't fix everything but it's a good start 💧
Proud of you for being here. Now drink up 💙
Your body is doing its best. Help it out 💧

down: Hey, it's okay. Let's start with one small sip 💙
Rough day? Water won't fix it, but it's a start 💧
Sending you something gentle. A sip of water 🌊
You don't have to do much. Just one sip 💙
It's okay to just exist. And hydrate. 💧
anxious: Let's take a breath. And a sip of water 🌊
One sip at a time. You're safe here 💙
Ground yourself: feel the water, drink it slowly 💧
Worry can wait. Water can't. Small sip? 🌿
Here's something you can control: this sip 💧
happy: You're glowing! Keep it going with some water ✨💧
Riding high? Stay hydrated to keep it going 💧
Love this energy! Water will keep it flowing 💙
Happy and hydrated is the vibe ✨💧
energetic: All that energy? Fuel it with water! ⚡💧
You're on fire! Don't forget hydration though 🔥
Channel that energy into… drinking water! 💪💧
High energy needs high hydration. Drink up! ⚡
Go go go! But also… sip sip sip 💧🏃
